header.label: Contact
header.title: Start a Conversation
header.description: Available for junior and entry-level opportunities, web development discussions, and professional connections.

availability.label: Current Availability
availability.title: Open to junior and entry-level web development opportunities.
availability.description: I am currently looking for opportunities where I can contribute through practical web development work while continuing to strengthen my technical foundations.

channels.label: Contact Channels
channels.title: Three direct ways to reach and review my work.
channels.description: Email is the primary communication channel. LinkedIn provides professional context, while GitHub contains repositories and ongoing technical work.

opportunities.label: Opportunity Scope
opportunities.title: Areas where I can contribute and continue learning.
opportunities.description: My current professional direction is focused on web development roles that value practical project experience, structured learning, and technical growth.
items: Web Development Internship or Entry-Level Program

closing.label: Professional Note
closing.title: Clear context helps the conversation move forward.
paragraphs: When contacting me regarding an opportunity, including the position, company, work arrangement, and expected responsibilities will help me understand the context.
For project discussions, a short description of the problem, intended users, scope, and expected timeline is a useful starting point.
